general.name: JumpCloud Privacy Preferences Policy Control
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>11E20883-EB02-4028-AF83-E5CEBB03DFF2</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>11E20883-EB02-4028-AF83-E5CEBB03DFF2</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>JumpCloud Privacy Preferences Policy Control</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>https://jumpcloud-support.force.com/support/s/article/Granting-Permissions-Needed-for-MacOS-Monterey</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>900A2C2C-4703-4C04-8779-B29D9CFAEAC7</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.TCC.configuration-profile-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>com.apple.TCC.configuration-profile-policy</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Privacy Preferences Policy Control #1</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>Services</key><dict><key>SystemPolicySysAdminFiles</key><array><dict><key>Identifier</key><string>/opt/jc/bin/jumpcloud-agent</string><key>CodeRequirement</key><string>identifier "jumpcloud-agent" and anchor apple generic and certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = N985MXSH85</string><key>IdentifierType</key><string>path</string><key>StaticCode</key><integer>0</integer><key>Allowed</key><integer>1</integer></dict><dict><key>Identifier</key><string>/opt/jc/bin/jumpcloud-agent-updater</string><key>CodeRequirement</key><string>identifier "jumpcloud-agent-updater-darwin" and anchor apple generic and certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = N985MXSH85 </string><key>IdentifierType</key><string>path</string><key>StaticCode</key><integer>0</integer><key>Allowed</key><integer>1</integer></dict><dict><key>Identifier</key><string>/opt/jc/bin/jcosqueryi</string><key>CodeRequirement</key><string>identifier osqueryd and anchor apple generic and certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = B89LNTUADM</string><key>IdentifierType</key><string>path</string><key>StaticCode</key><integer>0</integer><key>Allowed</key><integer>1</integer></dict></array></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
